productDisplayName: Nike Men Wine Air Force Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Replete with a low-cut silhouette and a versatile look, the nike Air Force 1 Mid has been crafted on the lines of the iconic AF1, blending classic style, innovative technology and fresh detailing in a Basketball shoe. Exceeding all standards of performance, functionality and excellence, the nike Air Force 1 is a celebrated sneaker.  Product Details High top synthetic leather upper with crisp edges for maximum durability and a cleaner look Low cut silhouette for a low-to-ground feel Cotton twill lace-up system with lightly padded tongue for snug Fit Metal tag on lace to honour the shoe with mildly cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort  Phylon midsole with an encapsulated Nike Air unit for lightweight cushioning and shock absorption Midsole with soft, springy cushioning  Non-marking rubber outsole for better traction and durability Pivot points on the big toe mound and heel, coupled with circular lugs for smooth transition in all directions  Material and Care Synthetic Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean  Do not store under sunlight
